name: Wacky Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cake flour, cocoa powder, sugar replacement, baking soda, and salt in a sifter.
2. Sift into a large bowl.
3. Add remaining ingredients and beat to mix.
4. Pour batter into a 9-inch square baking dish.
5. Bake at 375°F for 35-40 minutes, or until done.
6. Alternatively, cook on medium power for 10-11 minutes in the microwave, turning the dish a quarter turn every 5 minutes.
Nutritional Information:
1 serving = 1 bread
1 fat calories = 89
